title: ADA-USDT Correlation Analysis
summary: Analysis of ADA and USDT from Oct 11 to Nov 10, 2025 reveals a strong positive correlation of 0.76, indicating they move together despite different risk profiles. ADA shows significantly higher volatility (5.03%) compared to USDT's minimal volatility (0.04%), while both assets experienced negative average daily returns during this period. This strong correlation limits diversification benefits between these two assets, though USDT's stability provides some risk mitigation against ADA's price swings.
suggestion: Limited diversification between ADA and USDT; consider adding uncorrelated assets.
